sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (test_date Date, test_interval IntervalWeek);
INSERT INTO test_table (test_date, test_interval) VALUES (toDate('2024-06-15'), toIntervalWeek(2));
UPDATE test_table SET test_date = test_date + toIntervalWeek(1) WHERE test_date = toDate('2024-06-15');
SELECT test_date, test_date + toIntervalWeek(3) AS new_date FROM test_table WHERE test_date < toDate('2025-01-01');
SELECT test_interval, toIntervalWeek(4) AS added_interval FROM test_table;
